creator: skyliegirl33@protonmail.com
text: I'll see if I can add output for that when I reboot into FreeBSD. DirectX version doesn't make a difference, the error is only slightly changed, but it still fails. DXVK versions don't make a difference either, nor does WineD3D. I do agree that drivers could be an issue, yes, but considering other games seem to function just fine, it seems odd to me.
